text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%syscall%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%uid%0%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/opt/microsoft/scx/tmp%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%sh%' AQL filter query

_$.description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research) SIGMA Title: OMIGOD SCX RunAsProvider ExecuteShellCommand - Auditd SIGMA Description: Rule to detect the use of the SCX RunAsProvider Invoke_ExecuteShellCommand to execute any UNIX/Linux command using the /bin/sh shell. SCXcore, started as the Microsoft Operations Manager UNIX/Linux Agent, is now used in a host of products including Microsoft Operations Manager. Microsoft Azure, and Microsoft Operations Management Suite.   False positives: - Legitimate use of SCX RunAsProvider Invoke_ExecuteShellCommand.  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
_$.name: OMIGOD SCX RunAsProvider ExecuteShellCommand - Auditd
